title: Price trend
subtitle: Confirmation that the market is actually rolling over.

indicators.name: 50-day vs 150-day SMA
indicators.description: The trend-confirmation gauge: historically the signal that a bear market is actually underway rather than merely feared. The 200-day SMA is shown for context and does not drive the status.
indicators.threshold: 50-day SMA below the 150-day with both flat or falling over 20 sessions (within +0.1%) = elevated (bear trigger). Below without slope confirmation = watch. Otherwise benign.
indicators.notes: Uptrend intact: the 50-day SMA (7,395) is above the 150-day (7,019). Cross-checked against FRED SP500 over 5 sessions (max diff 0.000%). Feeds verified against each other and logged in VERIFICATION.md.
